items.name: Nightmare Sam Hain
items.description:
You wouldn't like Sam Hain when he's angry. No one at Vikander-Kneed Technical Media does either. Good thing this isn't canon to Pathos lore! Item is only obtainable by holders of the Halloween 2021 badge and will not go for re-sale.

-------

Nightmare Sam Hain is based on SCP-6750 by PlaguePJP and J Dune on the SCP Wiki, hosted by Wikidot. This item is therefore released under CC BY-SA 3.0.
